demo.title: bankrliq-lp.sh
demo.code:
# Find the best pools for a token
bankr prompt "using the bankrliq-lp skill, what are the best pools for HOPCAT?"

# Add liquidity with one token only
bankr prompt "using the bankrliq-lp skill, add my HOPCAT to its most used pool"

# LP both sides into a WETH/USDC pool
bankr prompt "using the bankrliq-lp skill, LP 50 USDC into the best WETH/USDC pool on Base"

# Harvest fees without closing
bankr prompt "using the bankrliq-lp skill, collect my LP fees"

# Exit everything in one signature
bankr prompt "using the bankrliq-lp skill, close all my liquidity positions"

setup: Install: ask Bankr to `install the bankrliq-lp skill from https://github.com/argostroloji/bankrliq/tree/main/skills/bankrliq-lp`
Endpoint calls are paid per-use with your USDC via x402 ($0.05 discovery, $0.50 tx prep, $1.00 close-all) — no registration
Every transaction is signed by YOUR wallet; the API only prepares calldata
